sentences.target: Je fais un voeu en soufflant les bougies.
sentences.reading: /ʒə fɛ œ̃ vø ɑ̃ suflɑ̃ le buʒi/

translations.fr: Je fais un voeu en soufflant les bougies.
translations.ipa: /ʒə fɛ œ̃ vø ɑ̃ suflɑ̃ le buʒi/
translations.en: I make a wish while blowing out the candles.
translations.es: Pido un deseo mientras soplo las velas.
translations.de: Ich wünsche mir etwas, während ich die Kerzen ausblase.
translations.it: Esprimo un desiderio mentre spengo le candeline.
translations.pt: Eu faço um pedido enquanto apago as velas.
translations.he: אני מבקש משאלה כשאני מכבה את הנרות.
translations.vi: Tôi ước một điều khi thổi nến.
translations.nl: Ik doe een wens terwijl ik de kaarsen uitblaas.
translations.hu: Kívánok valamit, miközben elfújom a gyertyákat.
translations.hi: मैं मोमबत्तियाँ बुझाते समय एक इच्छा माँगता हूँ.
translations.el: Κάνω μια ευχή ενώ σβήνω τα κεριά.
translations.nb: Jeg ønsker meg noe mens jeg blåser ut lysene.
translations.id: Aku membuat permohonan sambil meniup lilin.
translations.sv: Jag önskar mig något medan jag blåser ut ljusen.
translations.ro: Îmi pun o dorință în timp ce sting lumânările.
translations.cs: Při sfoukávání svíček si něco přeji.
translations.da: Jeg ønsker mig noget, mens jeg puster lysene ud.
translations.fi: Toivon jotain, kun puhallan kynttilät sammuksiin.
translations.ja: ろうそくを吹き消しながら願いごとをします。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; the subject of the verb 'fais'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the action performed by 'Je'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'voeu' as an indefinite object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'fais'.
Preposition introducing a gerundial/participial clause indicating manner or time.
Present participle functioning as a non-finite clause headed by 'en'; indicates the manner ('by blowing').
Definite article, plural; determiners the noun 'bougies' within the participial phrase.
Common noun, plural; object/complement of the participle 'soufflant'.

sentences.target: On fait un voeu en jetant une pièce.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fɛ œ̃ vø ɑ̃ ʒətɑ̃ yn pjɛs/

translations.fr: On fait un voeu en jetant une pièce.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fɛ œ̃ vø ɑ̃ ʒətɑ̃ yn pjɛs/
translations.en: We make a wish while tossing a coin.
translations.es: Pedimos un deseo al lanzar una moneda.
translations.de: Wir wünschen uns etwas, wenn wir eine Münze werfen.
translations.it: Esprimiamo un desiderio mentre lanciamo una moneta.
translations.pt: Fazemos um pedido ao jogar uma moeda.
translations.he: אנחנו מבקשים משאלה כשאנחנו זורקים מטבע.
translations.tr: Bir madeni para atarken dilek dileriz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta ước một điều khi ném đồng xu.
translations.ar: نتمنى أمنية عند رمي قطعة نقدية.
translations.nl: We doen een wens terwijl we een muntje gooien.
translations.hi: हम सिक्का फेंकते समय एक इच्छा माँगते हैं.
translations.el: Κάνουμε μια ευχή όταν ρίχνουμε ένα νόμισμα.
translations.nb: Vi ønsker oss noe når vi kaster en mynt.
translations.id: Kami membuat permohonan saat melempar koin.
translations.sv: Vi önskar oss något när vi kastar ett mynt.
translations.ro: Ne punem o dorință când aruncăm o monedă.
translations.cs: Když házíme minci, něco si přejeme.
translations.da: Vi ønsker os noget, når vi kaster en mønt.
translations.ja: コインを投げるときに願いごとをします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; the subject of 'fait'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; action carried out by 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'voeu' as an indefinite object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'fait'.
Preposition introducing a participial clause indicating manner ('by').
Present participle governed by 'en'; expresses the manner ('by throwing').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'pièce'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the participle 'jetant'.

sentences.target: Tu gardes ce voeu pour toi, d'accord.
sentences.reading: /ty ɡaʁd sə vø puʁ twa dakɔʁ/

translations.fr: Tu gardes ce voeu pour toi, d'accord.
translations.ipa: /ty ɡaʁd sə vø puʁ twa dakɔʁ/
translations.en: You keep that wish to yourself, okay.
translations.de: Behalte diesen Wunsch für dich, einverstanden.
translations.it: Tieni per te quel desiderio, d'accordo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个愿望你自己留着，好吗。
translations.yue: 嗰個願望你自己收埋，好嗎。
translations.ru: Оставь это желание при себе, ладно.
translations.pt: Guarda esse desejo para ti, está bem.
translations.he: תשמור את המשאלה הזאת לעצמך, בסדר.
translations.vi: Giữ điều ước đó cho riêng mình nhé.
translations.nl: Houd die wens voor jezelf, oké.
translations.uk: Залиши це бажання при собі, гаразд.
translations.hu: Tartsd meg ezt a kívánságot magadnak, rendben.
translations.hi: वह इच्छा अपने पास ही रखो, ठीक है.
translations.pl: Zachowaj to życzenie dla siebie, dobrze.
translations.el: Κράτα αυτή την ευχή για τον εαυτό σου, εντάξει.
translations.nb: Hold det ønsket for deg selv, greit.
translations.id: Simpan keinginan itu untuk dirimu sendiri, ya.
translations.sv: Behåll den önskan för dig själv, okej.
translations.ro: Păstrează dorința aceea pentru tine, bine.
translations.cs: Nech si to přání pro sebe, dobře.
translations.da: Behold det ønske for dig selv, okay.
translations.ja: その願いごとは自分だけのものにしておいてね。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; the subject of 'gardes'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; describes the action performed by 'Tu'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the noun 'voeu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'gardes'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Stressed personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel; forms the fixed expression with 'accord'.
Common noun; with 'd'' forms the set phrase 'd'accord' functioning here as a parenthetical confirmation ('okay').

sentences.target: Nous avons un voeu pour l'année prochaine.
sentences.reading: /nu zavɔ̃ œ̃ vø puʁ lane pʁɔʃɛn/

translations.fr: Nous avons un voeu pour l'année prochaine.
translations.ipa: /nu zavɔ̃ œ̃ vø puʁ lane pʁɔʃɛn/
translations.en: We have a wish for next year.
translations.es: Tenemos un deseo para el año que viene.
translations.de: Wir haben einen Wunsch für nächstes Jahr.
translations.it: Abbiamo un desiderio per l'anno prossimo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们对明年有一个愿望。
translations.yue: 我哋有一個對下年嘅願望。
translations.ru: У нас есть желание на следующий год.
translations.pt: Temos um desejo para o próximo ano.
translations.tr: Gelecek yıl için bir dileğimiz var.
translations.vi: Chúng ta có một điều ước cho năm sau.
translations.nl: We hebben een wens voor volgend jaar.
translations.uk: У нас є бажання на наступний рік.
translations.hu: Van egy kívánságunk a जövő évre.
translations.hi: हमारे पास अगले साल के लिए एक इच्छा है.
translations.el: Έχουμε μια ευχή για την επόμενη χρονιά.
translations.nb: Vi har et ønske for neste år.
translations.id: Kami punya sebuah harapan untuk tahun depan.
translations.sv: Vi har en önskan för nästa år.
translations.ro: Avem o dorință pentru anul viitor.
translations.da: Vi har et ønske for næste år.
translations.ja: 来年のための願いごとがあります。
